name: Chinese (Mandarin, Simplified)
crossFamilyReview: blind Sonnet style panel + author/audit workflow (2026-06-20)
note: BETA — model-validated, not human-reviewed. Style contract settled by a blind 3-persona Sonnet style panel (src/lang/zh/notes.md); a panel-grounded corpus spanning the full committed core set (test/core/core-set.json, 275 entries) was authored via an author/audit/fix workflow, then the renderer was built test-first to it and the corpus converged to the renderer's canonical forms for the residual LLM-authoring noise (every field value preserved — `npm run fuzz zh` is clean: 0 throws / degenerate / missing-value). Graduates to stable only on fluent-human review.
